title: Runtime Configuration Schema
description: JSON Schema for llama.rn adaptive runtime configuration across device tiers

model.description: Absolute path or asset URI to GGUF model file

n_ctx.description: Context window size in tokens. Budget 4GB devices: 1024, Mid-range 6GB: 2048, Premium 8GB+: 4096

n_batch.description: Batch size for prefill phase. Lower values (32-128) for mobile, higher (256-512) for desktop.

n_ubatch.description: Optional: Micro-batch size for token-by-token decoding (typically equal to or less than n_batch)

n_threads.description: Number of CPU threads for inference. Should not exceed physical core count + hyperthreading

n_threads_batch.description: Optional: Number of threads used for batch processing. Defaults to n_threads if omitted

n_gpu_layers.description: Number of model layers to offload to GPU. 0 = CPU only, 99 = all layers on GPU. Mobile: 0-50, Desktop: 50-99

use_mmap.description: Enable memory-mapped file loading. CRITICAL for mobile (reduces cold start RAM by 40-60%). Always true for low-RAM devices.

use_mlock.description: Lock model weights in physical RAM. MUST be false on mobile to prevent OOM termination. Only true on high-RAM servers.

cache_type_k.description: Quantization type for Key cache. f16=full precision, q8_0=int8 (50% memory), q4_0=int4 (75% memory). Budget: q8_0, Premium: f16

cache_type_v.description: Quantization type for Value cache. Typically matches cache_type_k for consistency.

temperature.description: Sampling temperature (0.0-2.0). Lower = more deterministic, higher = more creative

top_p.description: Nucleus sampling: keep top P probability mass (0-1). 0.9 keeps 90% most likely tokens

top_k.description: Keep top K most likely tokens. Typical: 40-250. Lower = more focused, higher = more diverse

dry_penalty.description: DRY penalty strength (0.0-2.0). Reduces repetitive sequences. 1.0 = baseline, >1.0 = penalize

dry_penalty_last_n.description: Look back N tokens for DRY penalty application. Budget: 32, Premium: 64

jinja.description: Enable Jinja2 template rendering for prompts/system messages. Required for recent models (Llama 2 chat, Mistral, etc)

embedding.description: Enable embedding generation. Disable for chat inference to save memory.
